text.title: Conflict Resolution Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: select-tk-mode
step.decision-gate: If unsure, default Collaborating; revisit after first round.

step.name: gather-observation
step.action: List only observable facts (dates, quotes, behaviors). Strip evaluative language.

step.name: draft-nvc
step.action: Compose 4-line NVC message respecting all field rules.

step.name: validate-and-send
step.action: Run `validate-conflict-resolution.py`. Sleep on it 1 night, then send.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, revise; if pseudo-feeling detected, revise wording.
